---
title: "Dashboard Analisis Data"
---

# Dashboard Interaktif

Klik link di bawah untuk membuka Dashboard analisis data:

**[Buka Dashboard →](../app.R)**

## Fitur Dashboard

| Tab | Deskripsi |
|-----|-----------|
| **Home** | Selamat datang & upload data |
| **Explore** | Preview data, summary, missing values |
| **Statistics** | Statistik deskriptif, correlation heatmap |
| **Visualize** | 6 jenis chart interaktif |
| **Time Series** | ARIMA forecasting |
| **Reports** | Generate laporan otomatis |

## Cara Menggunakan

1. Buka RStudio
2. Jalankan file `app.R`:
   ```r
   shiny::runApp("app.R")
   ```
3. Upload dataset Anda
4. Eksplorasi data dengan fitur yang tersedia
5. Generate laporan

## Supported Data Formats

- CSV
- TXT (tab-separated)
- XLS / XLSX

---

*Kembali ke [Home](index.Rmd)*
